name: RadioMaster Boxer MAX Radio Transmitter - ELRS 2.4GHz M2
description: The RadioMaster Boxer Max improves an already stellar radio with extra features like AG01 hall gimbals pre-installed, quality CNC buttons, and comfortable leather grips for excellent ergonomics.

name: RadioMaster Boxer Radio Transmitter - 4-in-1 Multi-Protocol/CC2500/ELRS 2.4GHz
description: The RadioMaster Boxer Radio Transmitter is compact, ergonomic, and powerful. Available in 4-in-1 Multi-Protocol, CC2500, or ELRS 2.4GHz options.

name: RadioMaster Zorro Max Lumenier Edition Radio Controller - 4-in-1 Multi-Protocol/ELRS 2.GHz
description: Lumenier has officially teamed up with RadioMaster to bring you the Lumenier Edition Zorro Max Radio Controller. Available in ELRS or 4-in-1 Multi-Protocol options.

name: TBS Tango 2 PRO FPV RC Radio Controller
description: The TBS Tango 2 PRO comes with full-size folding HAL sensor gimbals, full-featured FreedomTX (temporary OpenTX fork), the lowest end-to-end latency of any remote and transmission system, and more!

name: RadioMaster AX12 Android Radio Controller - ELRS 2.4GHz
description: Where Precision Meets Possibility - RadioMaster AX12 Android Radio Controller.

name: RadioMaster TX16S MK3 MAX Radio Controller - ELRS Dual-Band
description: The RadioMaster TX16S MK3 MAX Radio Controller builds on the globally trusted TX16S legacy, continuing its commitment to open-source RC innovation.

name: RadioMaster TX16S MK3 Radio Controller - ELRS Dual-Band
description: RadioMaster TX16S MK3 Radio Controller - ELRS Dual-Band continues to lead open-source RC innovation, building on the trusted global legacy of the TX16S series.

name: CubePilot Herelink Blue Controller V1.1
description: The Herelink Blue Controller V1.1 is an all-in-one remote control and ground station designed for long-range drone operation, combining RC control, HD video, and telemetry into a single portable unit.

name: RadioMaster TX16S MKII MAX PRO Radio Transmitter w/ AG01 Gimbals - Lumenier Edition - ELRS 2.4GHz
description: Lumenier has officially teamed up with RadioMaster to bring you the Lumenier Edition TX16S MKII MAX PRO Radio Transmitter.

name: CubePilot Herelink Blue Bundle V1.1
description: The Herelink Blue V1.1 Bundle is an integrated remote controller, ground station, and wireless digital transmission system assembled and supported in the USA by NW Blue LLC.
